summary: A clip from a radio or streaming talk show set. A gray-haired host in a blazer sits at a desk speaking into a microphone, with a backdrop reading 'GLENN BECK PROGRAM' and a horse-and-rider silhouette. A lower-third graphic labeled 'On the Phone' identifies a phone guest as the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services Director, with a small inset portrait. A wider sampled frame shows the full studio with multiple monitors.

script.scene: A host speaks into a microphone at a desk; backdrop reads 'GLENN BECK PROGRAM'; a lower-third names a USCIS Director phone guest.
The host continues speaking, same framing and lower-third graphic.
A wide shot of the studio shows the host and another person at a desk surrounded by wall-mounted monitors.

notable_text: GLENN BECK PROGRAM; On the Phone; U.S. Citizenship & Immigration Services Director
